note_text:
Patient: 70M presenting with inflammatory bowel disease.
Conservative management including preventive medication trial, beta-blockers was attempted over approximately 11 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with inflammatory bowel disease.
Referring gastroenterology physician requests authorization for biologic therapy.

gold.imaging_evidence: findings consistent with inflammatory bowel disease
